name: payabl. Payment Gateway API
description: Payment Gateway API for payabl. Supports card payments (authorize, pre-authorize, capture, refund, reversal, credit fund transfer), hosted payment page initiation, and Web SDK session creation. Authentication uses a SHA-1 signature parameter included in the request body.
